raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a XXXX phone from Best Buy and used their credit card. I returned the phone per the stores instructions via XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I received a confirmation on XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX advising the phone was delivered. I have gone to store XXXX  times to fix and Best Buy blames XXXX and XXXX blames Best Buy.
